expectations.text: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py inspect <file>' to get model structure
expectations.evidence: Report header: 'Tool used: uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py inspect'. Raw JSON output in inspect_raw.json confirms the inspect command produced structured output with status 'ok'.

expectations.text: The inspect output lists all 20 named ranges (6 Inp_ + 14 calculations)
expectations.evidence: Summary: 'Total Named Ranges: 20'. Layer tables list 6 assumption inputs (Inp_ prefix) and 14 calculation ranges. inspect_raw.json confirms 'count': 20.

expectations.text: Identifies which named ranges are on the Assumptions sheet vs Calculations sheet
expectations.evidence: Layer 1: 'Sheet: Assumptions, Named Ranges: 6'. Layer 2: 'Sheet: Calculations, Named Ranges: 14'. Each range listed with its sheet.

expectations.text: Distinguishes raw values (inputs) from formula cells (calculations)
expectations.evidence: Layer 1 table: 'Type: Raw values'. Layer 2 table: 'Type: Formulas'. Each calculation shows its formula (e.g., '=Units_Y1*Inp_Price'). Assumption cells show values only.

expectations.text: Reports whether intent notes (comments) are present on formula cells
expectations.evidence: Summary table: 'Assumptions: Intent Notes: None'. 'Calculations: Intent Notes: All 14 have'. Each calculation range in the table shows its intent note text.

expectations.text: Presents the information in an organized, human-readable format — not raw JSON dump
expectations.evidence: Report uses organized sections (Summary, Layer 1, Layer 2, Formula Dependency Chain, Observations) with formatted tables. The raw JSON is in a separate inspect_raw.json file, not in the main report.
